# Upsoma Restro

> All-in-one restaurant platform: QR self-ordering, real-time kitchen display, billing, self-serve receipts, ratings, multi-outlet analytics and guest re-engagement marketing over WhatsApp, RCS and SMS. 10-day free trial, billed per table.

Upsoma Restro turns every order into a marketing lead: it captures the guest's name, mobile number, items and bill amount, then helps restaurants win them back with targeted local offers.

## Docs

- [Home](https://upsomarestro.com/): Product overview, features, pricing and demo booking.
- [Privacy Policy](https://upsomarestro.com/privacy-policy): How guest and restaurant data is collected, used and protected.
- [Terms & Conditions](https://upsomarestro.com/terms): Terms governing use of the platform, trial and per-table pricing.
